footnote_text: Horizon 1y uses 3718 analysis-ready issuer-filing-window observations, including 138 treated and 3580 control observations.
Standard errors are issuer-clustered across 516 issuers; treated observations span 44 treated issuer clusters.
The primary outcome is winsorized within horizon at p01/p99; for 1y, the p01/p99 thresholds are -0.8479286600 and 1.1130019511.
Non-analysis-ready rows were retained upstream with explicit statuses: not_computed_missing_issuer_return_inside_window: 7; not_computed_raw_coverage_incomplete: 7.
